title: Cannabis and industrial hemp contact information for licence holders, applicants and industry - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis and industrial hemp contact information for licence holders, applicants and industry
Government of Canada contact information for people who have questions about cannabis and industrial hemp in Canada.

## Find contacts by keyword
Enter a keyword to find the relevant contact information:
Questions related to:
General cannabis-related services and information
cannabis@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone (toll-free): 1-866-337-7705
General industrial hemp information and information on industrial hemp licences
hemp-chanvre@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone (toll-free): 1-866-337-7705
Information on: the licensing process your licence application changes to your licence reporting on key investors physical security measures the sale and distribution of cannabis and hemp organizational security plans and their requirements the types of licences issued under the Cannabis Act and its regulations
- the licensing process
- your licence application
- changes to your licence
- reporting on key investors
- physical security measures
- the sale and distribution of cannabis and hemp
- organizational security plans and their requirements
- the types of licences issued under the Cannabis Act and its regulations
For cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes licences: licensing-cannabis-licences@hc-sc.gc.ca For research, analytical testing and cannabis drug licences: sp-licensing-cannabis-licences-sp@hc-sc.gc.ca If applicable, include your Licence application ID (APP #) or your Licence number (LIC #) found in the CTLS in the subject line
For cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes licences: licensing-cannabis-licences@hc-sc.gc.ca
For research, analytical testing and cannabis drug licences: sp-licensing-cannabis-licences-sp@hc-sc.gc.ca
If applicable, include your Licence application ID (APP #) or your Licence number (LIC #) found in the CTLS in the subject line
Information on: transactional fees for: licence applications import or export permits security clearance applications annual regulatory fees medical exemption requests statements of cannabis revenue requirements
- transactional fees for: licence applications import or export permits security clearance applications
- licence applications
- import or export permits
- security clearance applications
- annual regulatory fees
- medical exemption requests
- statements of cannabis revenue requirements

Indigenous-affiliated applicants for cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes licences: Licensing process and cannabis-related resources
navigator-navigateur@hc-sc.gc.ca
Outreach, engagement and collaboration with First nations, Inuit and Métis regarding cannabis legalization and regulations
cannabis@hc-sc.gc.ca Use subject line "Attention: Indigenous Affairs"
Security clearances under the Cannabis Act and specific security clearance applications for individuals
security-cannabis-securite@hc-sc.gc.ca
Compliance and enforcement information including: recalls of cannabis promotion of cannabis reporting loss or theft of cannabis possible actions due to unpaid fees testing cannabis for cannabinoids, contaminants, dissolution and disintegration pest control products and their use on cannabis, and mandatory testing requirements formulation, production and composition requirements for cannabis products packaging and labelling for cannabis and cannabis products general information on complying with the Cannabis Regulations
Compliance and enforcement information including:
- promotion of cannabis

- possible actions due to unpaid fees
- testing cannabis for cannabinoids, contaminants, dissolution and disintegration
- pest control products and their use on cannabis, and mandatory testing requirements

compliance-cannabis-conformite@hc-sc.gc.ca
Information on: preventive control plans good production practices for cannabis publication of non-compliant inspection reports
- preventive control plans
- good production practices for cannabis
- publication of non-compliant inspection reports
inspectionscannabisinspections@hc-sc.gc.ca
Cannabis tracking and licensing system (CTLS)
ctls-sscdl@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone (toll-free): 1-866-337-7705
Importing and exporting cannabis and industrial hemp including applying for a permit
import-export-cannabis-importation-exportation@hc-sc.gc.ca
